title: Python Candlestick Recognition Engine (I) — Manual Detection
subtitle: 7 Candlestick Patterns with MQL5-Python Bridge, Flask Server, Pandas DataFrame
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: MEDIUM EXTRACT — all 7 pattern formulas collected. Architecture is pure Python via Flask (bridge pattern). Morning/Evening Star 3-candle detection is the key new addition vs Part 24/26. We already have Python-native architecture.

bullish_engulfing.condition: prev_red AND curr_open < prev_close AND curr_close > prev_open

bearish_engulfing.condition: prev_green AND curr_open > prev_close AND curr_close < prev_open

bullish_harami.condition: prev_red(large) AND curr_green(small, body inside prev body)

bearish_harami.condition: prev_green(large) AND curr_red(small, body inside prev body)

morning_star.condition: bar[-3] large_bearish AND bar[-2] small_body(<50% of bar[-3]) AND bar[-1] large_bullish AND bar[-1].close > bar[-3].midpoint

evening_star.condition: bar[-3] large_bullish AND bar[-2] small_body(<50% of bar[-3]) AND bar[-1] large_bearish AND bar[-1].close < bar[-3].midpoint

keep: Morning Star 3-candle formula: bar[-3] large bearish, bar[-2] small (<50% body), bar[-1] large bullish above midpoint
Harami: current body enclosed within prior body (inside body pattern)
improve: Morning/Evening Star at zone boundary: 3-candle confirmation at demand/supply zone = very high confidence
Add all patterns to classify_candle() from Part 24 as extended cases
